_notes: Edge-case repos that don't fit cleanly into v1.0's 9-archetype ontology.
Kept separate so they don't drag headline accuracy.

fixtures._note: Platform itself, not deployment manifests; closest fit is devops_infra.
Ruby gem that ships a CLI; classifier may pick production_saas due to internal Docker testing.
Ships its own helm chart for self-hosting; helm fires devops_infra rule.
Kernel; no v1.0 archetype fits cleanly.
JavaScript runtime; no v1.0 archetype fits cleanly. Classifier reads library/production_saas which is defensible.
Uses Jakefile/gulp instead of yarn workspaces; monorepo rule misses.
